data.name: Fill
data.value: Fill in the registration form and accept the terms and conditions to gain access to the panel.

data.name: gcText
data.value: Please provide details of all people who will be staying at the property.

data.name: Ready
data.value: Your stay panel is now available!

data.name: Step2
data.value: I accept the obligation to report any damage or comments upon check-in.

data.name: Step3
data.value: I accept the ban on smoking tobacco products and electronic cigarettes inside the premises.

data.name: Step4
data.value: It is prohibited to organise events or accept third parties not included in the booking.

data.name: Step12
data.value: on the day of check-in to

data.name: Terms
data.value:
RENTAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS The Terms and Conditions and Agreement set out the terms and conditions for booking and renting apartments offered for rent by Rentoom Apartamenty Sp. z o.o. (the Lessor), ul. Stanisława Szymańskiego 1B, 87-100 Toruń, NIP: 879-27-27-407, KRS: 0000871532 on behalf of the Tenant. 1. Booking or renting accommodation is tantamount to reading and accepting the provisions of the Terms and Conditions and the Agreement. 2. The competent court in Toruń shall be responsible for resolving any disputes. 3. The Landlord reserves the right to refuse to accept a Guest who: does not have a valid identity document (i.e. identity card or passport) or refuses to present such a document, is under the influence of alcohol or other intoxicating substances, or has violated the provisions of the Regulations during a previous stay. 4. The Landlord reserves the right to immediately terminate the contract with a Guest who violates the Rental Regulations, without the right to a refund of the booking fee. The Guest will be obliged to immediately leave the premises. 5. The hotel day lasts from 3:00 p.m. to 11:00 a.m. the following day. 6. On the day of departure, the Tenant is obliged to vacate the apartment by 11:00 a.m., otherwise a fee equal to the next day's rate + 50% will be charged. 7. Smoking in the apartments is strictly prohibited. For violating the smoking ban inside the apartment , the Tenant shall be required to pay an additional fee of PLN 500 (five hundred). 8. It is forbidden to use electrical equipment that is not part of the apartment's furnishings and poses a fire hazard. 9. The Tenant is obliged to immediately inform the Landlord of any damage or malfunction of the apartment's equipment.
10. Pets are accepted only with the consent of the Landlord. The fee for a pet is PLN 50 for the entire stay. 11. Quiet hours are from 10:00 p.m. to 6:00 a.m. in the rented apartment. Persons not registered in the apartment may visit only until 11:00 p.m. 12. Organising social events in the apartment is strictly prohibited. For organising a social event, the Tenant shall pay the Landlord an additional fee of PLN 5,000 + any additional losses incurred by the Landlord. The Tenant is responsible for any damage to the rented apartment and the building. The Tenant is responsible for any damage caused by third parties staying in the apartment. The Tenant is responsible for all damage to the rented apartment and the building. The Tenant is responsible for all damage resulting from the behaviour of third parties staying with them in the apartment – invited to the flat/building by that person. In the event of intervention by the Police or the Municipal Police, the Landlord will charge the Tenant an additional fee of PLN 500 (five hundred zlotys). 13. The number of persons staying overnight in the apartment may not exceed the number specified at the time of booking. Any irregularities in this regard will result in an additional charge of PLN 200 for each unregistered person for each night of stay. 14. Guests are obliged to secure the apartment properly, i.e. to close all entrance doors and windows carefully before leaving the apartment each time and to store keys/codes/remote controls in such a way that unauthorised persons cannot access them. 15. The Landlord is not responsible for damaged or lost valuables left in the apartment. 16. In the event of loss/damage of the apartment key or garage remote control, a fee of PLN 200 per item will be charged. 17. Final cleaning is included in the price of the stay. However, the Guest is obliged to leave the dishes washed and the equipment used. 17. Final cleaning is included in the price of the stay. However, the Guest is obliged to leave the dishes and used equipment washed. These activities are not part of the final cleaning. 18. Any additional cleaning at the special request of the Landlord is payable in accordance with the service fee. The price includes the replacement of bed linen and towels. 19. Fees for utilities provided by the Landlord are included in the price of the stay. Rentoom Apartamenty Sp. z o.o. Ul. Szymańskiego 1B, 87-100 Toruń www.rentoom.pl | tel. +48 881 388 001 20. The Tenant is financially responsible for all damage/theft occurring in the apartment during their stay. ` 21. Please inform us immediately if there is any misunderstanding or if you are not satisfied with our services. We will make every effort to thoroughly investigate the problem and resolve it. 22. The Landlord may charge guests a deposit of up to PLN 1,000 for reservations, which will be refunded within five working days after check-out. 23. The Landlord is entitled to claim compensation exceeding the value of additional fees on each occasion. 24. The tenant has the right to complain about the service. Complaints should be submitted by email to: reklamacje@rentoom.pl or by registered letter to the correspondence address. A response will be provided within 14 days of receipt.
